creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
It has already been explained a couple of time, a port need a MASTER_SITE which is not distcache because distcache can be invalidated entirely at any moment resulting in the distfile being unfetchable.

distcache (aka freebsd mirror for distfiles) is only there to provide the distfile when the master_site are temporary not reachable not as a main location to fetch the distfile.
There is no abuse here
